title: Find sellable technical article angles
objective: Generate article ideas that can be monetized quickly from local-only validation work around physical AI, Isaac Sim, Genesis, and robotics simulation.
context: The operator wants near-term revenue. Ideas should prefer topics that can be validated on a Mac, local NVIDIA machine, or free cloud tiers.
constraints: Separate free content from paid content
Avoid ideas that require enterprise-only infrastructure
Include at least one English-facing angle and one Japanese note angle
